name: youtube-vocab-extractor
description: Extract highlighted vocabulary (new words and phrasal verbs) from YouTube videos with subtitles

examples.output:
# Vocabulary Extracted from YouTube Video

## New Words
- word1: definition
- word2: definition

## Phrasal Verbs
- phrasal verb 1: meaning
- phrasal verb 2: meaning

*Note: This skill works with videos that have subtitles available.*

permissions.description: Fetch YouTube video transcripts and metadata
Run Python scripts for vocabulary processing
